zh.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte是William de Veteri Ponte和Anina的女兒，於大約1312年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾蘭頓。她於1335年與Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte是William de Veteri Ponte和Anina的女儿，于大约1312年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾蘭頓。她于1335年与Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在英国苏格兰Comhairle nan Eilean Siar頓享年49岁。

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte was born about 1312, in Langton, Berwickshire, Scotland as the daughter of William de Veteri Ponte and Anina. She married Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton in 1335. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1360, in Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte est née environ 1312, à Langton, Berwickshire, Écosse, fille de William de Veteri Ponte et Anina. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton en 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.dun, berwickshire, england: Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte wurde um 1312 in Langton, Berwickshire, Scotland, als Tochter von William de Veteri Ponte und Anina geboren. Sie hat 1335 Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton nel 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponteは約1312年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアラントンでWilliam de Veteri PonteとAninaの娘として生まれた。1335年にSir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Boltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリススコットランドComhairle nan Eilean Siarダンで49歳で死去した。

ko.dun, berwickshire, england: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 던
ko.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte(은)는 대략 1312년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 랭턴에서 William de Veteri Ponte(와)과 Anina의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1335년 Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 던에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Langton, Berwickshire, Scotland filha de William de Veteri Ponte e Anina. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton em 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Dun, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.dun, berwickshire, england: дун, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Mariota De Veteri-Ponte родилась около 1312 г. в местности лангтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали William de Veteri Ponte и Anina. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander De Cockburn Der Cockburn of that ilk and Henderlands, Baron of Langton, Carriden and Bolton в 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности дун, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
